Adrenalin® is indicated for use as follows:
1.1 Anaphylaxis

1.1 Anaphylaxis
Emergency treatment of allergic reactions (Type I), including anaphylaxis, which may result
from insect stings or bites, foods, drugs, sera, diagnostic testing substances and other allergens,
as well as idiopathic anaphylaxis or exercise-induced anaphylaxis.
